document_api_meta.title: Get Inbound Method Detail
document_api_meta.env_desc: Get detailed information regarding inbound plan placement options.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: inbound_method
request_body_param.desc:
**Possible values:**
* `D2FC` (Direct to fulfillment center, may be split into multiple shipments)
* `ONE_HUB` (Single destination, includes fee)

request_body_param.name: estimate_arrival_time
request_body_param.desc: Estimated arrival time. Value should be retrieved from the `available_time_window_list` from `ListAvailableInboundMethod` API response

request_body_param.name: ^start_timestamp
request_body_param.desc:
Epoch seconds timestamp representing Sunday at midnight like 2026-03-22T07:00:00Z (PDT)

**This value needs to exactly match the available start_timestamp retrieved from ListAvailableInboundMethod API**

request_body_param.name: ^end_timestamp
request_body_param.desc:
Epoch seconds timestamp representing Sunday at midnight like 2026-03-22T07:00:00Z (PDT)


**This value needs to exactly match the available end_timestamp retrieved from ListAvailableInboundMethod API**

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^allocation_shipments
response_param.desc: List of shipments for this placement option.

response_param.name: ^^^^carton_type
response_param.desc:
Indicates if this is a single SKU carton or multi SKU carton.
**Possible values:**
* `SINGLE_SKU`
* `MULTI_SKU`

response_param.name: ^^^^items
response_param.desc: Goods item list of a carton.

response_param.name: ^^^^^expiration_timestamp
response_param.desc: The expiration date for this item, Unix timestamp in seconds.

response_param.name: ^^^^^weight_unit
response_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the weight of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `KILOGRAM` (kg)
* `GRAM` (g)
* `MILLIGRAM` (mg)
* `POUNDS` (lbs)
* `OUNCE` (oz)

response_param.name: ^^^^^length_unit
response_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the dimensions (length, width, height) of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `METER` (m)
* `CENTIMETER` (cm)
* `MILLIMETER` (mm)
* `FOOT` (ft)
* `MICRON` (μm)
* `INCH` (in)

response_param.name: ^^placement_option_id
response_param.desc: Placement option id. A placement option represents the shipment splits and destinations.

response_param.name: ^^^currency
response_param.desc:
The unit of currency used for the  amount.

**Possible values:**
* `USD`
* `CNY`
* `EUR`
* `GBP`

response_param.name: ^expiration_timestamp
response_param.desc: Expiration time for placement option. Placement results expire in one day. After that, you must call this API again to generate a new placement task.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Request or request parameters are empty. Please recheck the input parameters.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FbtV202602API.Fbt202602InboundMethodDetailPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody()
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody.SetPlanId("5766071177167344427")
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody.SetInboundMethod("D2FC")
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBodyEstimateArrivalTime := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBodyEstimateArrivalTime()
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBodyEstimateArrivalTime.SetStartTimestamp("1774162800")
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBodyEstimateArrivalTime.SetEndTimestamp("1774767600")
    fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody.SetEstimateArrivalTime(*fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBodyEstimateArrivalTime)
    request = request.Fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody(*fbt202602GetInboundMethodDetailRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
